channel.title: Best Oven in india on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Best Oven in india on Tech Tracker

item.title: AmazonBasics Microwave review : best Oven under 10,000rs in india.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-s3m44rUu2jQ/YoKtLQaMbFI/AAAAAAAALAA/duY_nHy7cF4bn_47GDvoDsRu7WgxcTnWwCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1652731177225364-0.png" alt=""> Ovens, a container to cook and bake food existed from long time but the first official oven recorded in year 1490 in france build using bricks and tiles from then we got to see different types of ovens for home and outdoor purposes, however few decades back ovens are big and very expensive thus not everyone able to use them. The invention of electricity changed the way we live right?
